title: cheirostylis tortilacinia var. rubrifolia
intro: Cheirostylis tortilacinia var. rubrifolia, commonly known as the Red-leafed Cheirostylis, is a plant species belonging to the family Diapensiaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its antiviral and expectorant properties. Cheirostylis tortilacinia var. rubrifolia can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or powder for oral consumption, or used in topical applications for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects.
